## FHIR Queries for Patients with High ALT

ALT (Alanine Aminotransferase) is identified by LOINC **1742-6**. "High" can be expressed via the `interpretation` flag or a `value-quantity` threshold (commonly > 40 U/L).

---

### Option 1 — Using Interpretation Code (Recommended)
```
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|1742-6&interpretation=http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-ObservationInterpretation|H&_include=Observation:subject
```

---

### Option 2 — Using Value Threshold (> 40 U/L)
```
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|1742-6&value-quantity=gt40|http://unitsofmeasure.org|U%2FL&_include=Observation:subject
```

---

### Option 3 — Broader ALT LOINC Codes (with/without P-5'-P variants)
```
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|1742-6,http://loinc.org|1743-4,http://loinc.org|1744-2&interpretation=http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-ObservationInterpretation|H&_include=Observation:subject
```

---

### Notes
| Detail | Value |
|---|---|
| Primary LOINC (ALT) | `1742-6` |
| Alt LOINC variants | `1743-4`, `1744-2` |
| Common normal upper limit | ~40 U/L (varies by sex/lab) |
| Interpretation code | `H` (High) |
| `_include` | Pulls linked `Patient` resources in one request |

1-broad.raw_response:
## FHIR Query — Severely Elevated ALT (≥225 U/L, ≥5× ULN)

**Clinical Context:** ALT ≥225 U/L represents ≥5× the standard upper limit of normal (~45 U/L), a threshold associated with significant hepatocellular injury (e.g., acute hepatitis, drug-induced liver injury, ischemic hepatitis).

---

### LOINC Codes Used
| Code | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `1742-6` | ALT [Enzymatic activity/vol] in Serum or Plasma |
| `1743-4` | ALT in Serum or Plasma — with P-5'-P |
| `1744-2` | ALT in Serum or Plasma — without P-5'-P |
| `76625-3` | ALT [Enzymatic activity/vol] in Blood |

---

### Queries

```
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|1742-6,http://loinc.org|1743-4,http://loinc.org|1744-2,http://loinc.org|76625-3&value-quantity=ge225||U/L&status=final,amended,corrected&_include=Observation:patient&_include=Observation:encounter
```

---

### Key Parameters Explained
| Parameter | Value | Rationale |
|-----------|-------|-----------|
| `code` | 4 ALT LOINC codes | Covers all common ALT panel variants |
| `value-quantity` | `ge225\|\|U/L` | ≥225 U/L = ≥5× ULN threshold |
| `status` | `final,amended,corrected` | Excludes preliminary/cancelled results |
| `_include` | `Observation:patient` | Pulls linked Patient resources |
